temporal.drift_type: Question: What is the evolution pattern of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {drift_type}
temporal.baseline: Question: What is the long-term baseline value of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {baseline}
temporal.kappa: Question: What is the mean reversion speed (kappa) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {kappa}
temporal.sigma: Question: What is the random fluctuation intensity (sigma) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {sigma}
temporal.lambda: Question: What is the coupling strength (lambda) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {lambda}
temporal.diffusion_shape: Question: What is the diffusion shape (diffusion_shape) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {diffusion_shape}
temporal.sinusoidal_A: Question: What is the sinusoidal amplitude (A) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {A}
temporal.sinusoidal_omega: Question: What is the sinusoidal frequency (omega) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {omega}
temporal.sinusoidal_phi: Question: What is the sinusoidal phase (phi) of node {node_id} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {phi}

spatial.edge_relationship: Question: Is there a direct connection from node {src} to node {tgt}? Answer: {answer}
spatial.indirect_connection: Question: Is there an indirect path (through one or more intermediate nodes) from node {src} to node {tgt}? Answer: {answer}

spatial_temporal.node_type: Question: What is the type of node {node_id}? demand_source or propagation? Answer: {node_type}
spatial_temporal.edge_lag: Question: What is the time lag between node {src} and node {tgt}? Answer: {lag}
spatial_temporal.edge_modulation: Question: What is the modulation multiplier (multiplier) of edge {edge} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {multiplier}
spatial_temporal.effective_coupling_strength: Question: What is the effective coupling strength of edge {edge} during the time range {time_range}? Answer: {multiplier * base_adjacency}
